parameters.query: SELECT iid, i_title_userside, i_full_schedule, i_eventdate, i_alimurl FROM item WHERE i_type = 'sharing' AND i_eventdate >= CURRENT_DATE AND i_open_sent_at IS NULL ORDER BY i_eventdate
